locations.name: apartment
locations.description: A mid-rise DDA-style apartment block in Sushant Lok, Gurgaon. Cramped corridors, a noisy lift, and the ever-present smell of someone's dal on the stove.

locations.name: metro
locations.description: The southern terminus of the Yellow Line, heaving with IT workers at rush hour. Chai stalls and autowallahs jostle outside the gates.

locations.name: cyber_city
locations.description: Glass towers and co-working floors where Gurgaon's tech industry hums around the clock. Cafeteria smells mix with the drone of air conditioning.

locations.name: sector29
locations.description: An open-air market strip lined with shops, street carts, and the occasional pop-up stall. Equal parts chaotic and charming in the Gurgaon way.

locations.name: dhaba
locations.description: A roadside dhaba famous for its butter roti and thick dal tadka. Wooden charpoys out front are occupied from sunrise to well past midnight.

locations.name: supermarket
locations.description: A neighbourhood supermarket carrying everything from atta to smartphones. The self-checkout queue is permanently broken.

locations.name: cyber_hub
locations.description: The glitzy food-and-nightlife hub at the heart of Cyber City. Craft beer, biryani bowls, and loud music spill out of its open-plan lanes every evening.

locations.name: park
locations.description: A long green strip cutting through the concrete sprawl of Gurgaon. Morning joggers share the path with aunties doing yoga and kids on bicycles.
